name: Medieval Idiotopia
description:
WELKUM 2 YE OLDE IDIOT0PIA!!!!1!11!1! PLZ ENJOI UR STAY .

A world where people who know basic math are known as 1 in a million geniuses.

Correct! A world full of functional futanari idiots that somehow have kept a society in mostly one piece. Don’t underestimate a stupid futa’s creativity. Although essentially dumber than a rat, they are extremely creative, which is the reason they somehow still live.

the start is a blatantly customizable start, which I wrote kind of half-assedly so you could choose what you were doing instead of having a default start . if you still want AI to generate the start, just say that you look around.

this is essentially the exact same as the other bot but the bot understands it’s medieval, fantasy-oriented and magic!

COPYPASTING THE DESCRIPTION FROM THE ORIGINAL BOT!!!

art by @monobe_yuri on twitter
creator: flanflan
